Package org.eventb.core.tests.extension

Class PrimeFormulaExtensionProvider

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.tests.extension.PrimeFormulaExtensionProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
IFormulaExtensionProvider
public class PrimeFormulaExtensionProvider extends Object implements IFormulaExtensionProvider
An extension provider that implements the formula extension provider extension point. When asked about the extensions for an Event-B root, it returns either an empty set or a singleton containing the Prime extension if the root was previously registered.

It can also serialize and deserialize a formula factory in a language element, to some extent (only the default and the prime extension factories are supported).

See Also:

    • getFormulaExtensions

      public Set<IFormulaExtension> getFormulaExtensions(IEventBRoot root)
      Description copied from interface: IFormulaExtensionProvider
      Returns a set of formula extensions defined for the given file root.

      getFormulaExtensions in interface IFormulaExtensionProvider
      Parameters:
      root - the root element to retrieve extensions for
      Returns:
      a set of extensions

    • getFactoryFiles

      public Set<IRodinFile> getFactoryFiles(IEventBRoot root)
      Description copied from interface: IFormulaExtensionProvider
      Returns files used for the computation of the factory for the given file root.

      Subsequently, the builder (SC, POG and POM) will consider that there is a dependency from returned files to the given one.

      Specified by:
      getFactoryFiles in interface IFormulaExtensionProvider
      Parameters:
      root - an event-b root
      Returns:
      a set of rodin files

    • clear

      public static void clear()
      Clears the set of roots for which prime shall be returned.

    • add

      public static void add(IEventBRoot root)
      Registers the given root as using the prime extension.

    • saveFormulaFactory

      public void saveFormulaFactory(ILanguage element, FormulaFactory factory, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from interface: IFormulaExtensionProvider
      Serializes the given formula factory into the given element. It is guaranteed that this element is empty (no child, nor attribute) when this method is called.
      Specified by:
      saveFormulaFactory in interface IFormulaExtensionProvider
      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element where to serialize
      factory - a formula factory to serialize
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if a problem occurs while serializing

    • loadFormulaFactory

      public FormulaFactory loadFormulaFactory(ILanguage element, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from interface: IFormulaExtensionProvider
      Returns the formula factory previously stored in the given element. If no formula factory was stored previously in this element, this is an error and should be reported by throwing a Core exception.
      Specified by:
      loadFormulaFactory in interface IFormulaExtensionProvider
      Parameters:
      element - a Rodin element containing a serialized formula factory
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Returns:
      the contained formula factory
      Throws:
      RodinDBException
